chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1262 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.6532/2025 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Rana Azam ul Hassan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel submits that the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority, however, seeks that the same be adjudicated after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, vide speaking order and pending the aforesaid, no coercive actin be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and submits that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
